scripts.android:update:build: npm run android:update:bump && npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleConsumerDebug && cd .. && npm run android:update:publish
scripts.android:play:bundle: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleConsumerRelease
scripts.android:play:prepare: npm run android:update:bump && npm run android:play:bundle
scripts.android:play:bundle:internal: npm run android:play:bundle && node scripts/sign-android-bundle-debug.cjs consumer
scripts.android:admin:debug: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleAdminDebug
scripts.android:admin:bundle: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat bundleAdminRelease
scripts.android:admin:bundle:internal: npm run android:admin:bundle && node scripts/sign-android-bundle-debug.cjs admin
scripts.android:admin:install: npm run cap:sync && cd android && gradlew.bat installAdminDebug
scripts.android:admin:build: npm run android:admin:debug && npm run android:admin:publish
scripts.deploy:prod:android: npm run android:update:build && npm run build && npx vercel --prod --yes
